daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Libra. The cosmos is whispering that you're in a sweet spot for authentic connection—whether that's with people or yourself. Trust the flow and let your natural charm do its thing.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift. If you're coupled up, this is peak moment for those real conversations you've been putting off. Single? Stay open—genuine connection is closer than you think.
daily.career: Your creative intuition is firing on all cylinders. This is the day to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a small risk. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement today—something that feels good, not forced. Dance, walk, stretch, whatever calls to you. Mental clarity follows physical ease.

weekly.overview: This week's energy invites you to find balance between giving and receiving. Venus is supporting your vibe, so lean into conversations that matter. Trust your gut when something feels off—your intuition is literally glowing rn.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is prime time for authentic connection. Stop overthinking and just be yourself. If there's someone on your mind, the universe is lowkey rooting for you to make a move. Go for it.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is hitting different this week. Projects that felt stuck might suddenly click into place. Collaborate with people who actually get your vision—your ideas deserve a real audience, not just surface-level vibes.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for balance, not extremes. Mix movement with rest. Maybe try something new that actually excites you instead of forcing routines that drain your soul. Listen to what your energy needs, not what you think you should do.
